name: eazo-factory
description: Generate bilingual, polished Eazo apps with Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Generate a bilingual, reviewed Eazo app from one prompt.
interface.longDescription: Eazo Factory turns one product prompt into a standardized bilingual Eazo app using the official Eazo Next.js template, a $imagegen UI reference board with an asset library, deterministic checks, mandatory independent review, and built-in onboarding for first-time users.
capabilities: Generate standardized Eazo apps from the official template
Create UI reference boards with reusable asset libraries
Audit every interactive control with an independent reviewer
defaultPrompt: Use @eazo-factory to show onboarding or create one standardized Eazo app.
